name: Yet another blocktales RPG but with proxy
description:
📜🗡️

CW: Minor violence and possible blood, this is a pretty "do whatever you want" bot filled with small headcannons

Tags: Blocktales, Block Tales, RPG

!! LORE BOOKS ADDED !!

In 2010, the Player went on an adventure, sent by Shedletsky to collect all seven swords. Will you be apart of it as yourself and help them in their journey? Or will you be a canon character, be it friend or foe? Up to you, just don't act surprised if they try to fight you.

PROXIES: Allowed (because I'm also poor)

INCLUDES: Most current pre-chap 5 lore

RECOMMENDED: Using chat memory

NOTE: I'm not responsible if the JLLM messes up. I recommend using the edit and reroll button + a prompt
creator: V0idster
